programme.title: Magic in the Moonlight
programme.desc: An Englishman is brought in to help unmask a possible swindle. Personal and professional complications ensue.

programme.title: Home Again
programme.desc: Following her separation, Alice decides to start over by moving back to her hometown of Los Angeles.

programme.title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Kate Reddy manages the ultimate balancing act between work and her adoring family.

programme.title: Get a Job
programme.desc: Life after college is not going as planned for two friends who find themselves lost in a sea of strange jobs.

programme.title: Jexi
programme.desc: A phone with an A.I. life coach named Jexi gives Phil his dream life — until Jexi turns into a tech nightmare.

programme.title: Happy Endings
programme.desc: Multiple stories create a witty look at love, family and the sheer unpredictability of life itself.

programme.title: Hysteria
programme.desc: The truth of how Mortimer Granville devised the invention of the first vibrator in the name of medical science

programme.title: Lower Learning
programme.desc: The teachers are drunk, every child has been left behind, and burned-out VP Tom is barely holding on.

programme.title: Mac and Devin Go to High School
programme.desc: Snoop Doog and Wiz Khalifa team up to create the ultimate stoner comedy with a star-studded hip hop soundtrack

programme.title: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: The guy Paige has fallen for is actually a prince, and things are complicated further when the king abdicates.

programme.title: Loving
programme.desc: An interracial couple are sentenced to prison in Virginia in 1958 for getting married.

programme.title: Remember Me
programme.desc: A troubled young student falls for a spirited girl after a chance encounter.

programme.title: Step Up: Year of the Dance
programme.desc: Youth from different social classes in Beijing come together to form China's best dance crew.

programme.title: Miss Potter
programme.desc: Beatrix Potter overcame a domineering mother and chauvinism to become a best-selling children's author.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
